=== Quick Fix Inventory ===

[D1] (5:27-5:106) TS377015: This expression contains chained `pipe` calls that can be simplified to a single `pipe` call. effect(unnecessaryPipeChain)
  Fix 0: "Disable unnecessaryPipeChain for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable unnecessaryPipeChain for entire file"
  Fix 2: "Rewrite as single pipe call"

[D2] (7:23-7:104) TS377015: This expression contains chained `pipe` calls that can be simplified to a single `pipe` call. effect(unnecessaryPipeChain)
  Fix 0: "Disable unnecessaryPipeChain for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable unnecessaryPipeChain for entire file"
  Fix 2: "Rewrite as single pipe call"

=== Quick Fix Application Results ===

=== [D1] Fix 0: "Disable unnecessaryPipeChain for this line" ===
skipped by default

=== [D1] Fix 1: "Disable unnecessaryPipeChain for entire file" ===
skipped by default

=== [D1] Fix 2: "Rewrite as single pipe call" ===

--- file:///.src/unnecessaryPipeChain.ts ---
// @effect-v3
import * as Effect from "effect/Effect"
import { pipe } from "effect/Function"

export const asPipeable = Effect.succeed(1).pipe(Effect.map(x => x + 2), Effect.map(x => x + 3))

export const asPipe = pipe(pipe(Effect.succeed(1), Effect.map((x) => x + 2)), Effect.map((x) => x + 3))


=== [D2] Fix 0: "Disable unnecessaryPipeChain for this line" ===
skipped by default

=== [D2] Fix 1: "Disable unnecessaryPipeChain for entire file" ===
skipped by default

=== [D2] Fix 2: "Rewrite as single pipe call" ===

--- file:///.src/unnecessaryPipeChain.ts ---
// @effect-v3
import * as Effect from "effect/Effect"
import { pipe } from "effect/Function"

export const asPipeable = Effect.succeed(1).pipe(Effect.map((x) => x + 2)).pipe(Effect.map((x) => x + 3))

export const asPipe = pipe(Effect.succeed(1), Effect.map(x => x + 2), Effect.map(x => x + 3))
